parameters.content: Intake, validation, normalization, duplicate detection, and priority classification.
PostgreSQL nodes use the credential named Local n8n Postgres. Rejections stay in the audit summary for transparent partial-failure handling.

parameters.query:
WITH src AS (
  SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS x(
    registration_plate text,
    company text,
    vehicle_group text,
    model text,
    wash_type text,
    eco boolean,
    current_status text,
    operational_priority text,
    maintenance_flag boolean,
    damage_flag boolean,
    fuel_level integer,
    current_location text,
    assigned_employee text,
    notes text,
    source_batch text,
    raw_record jsonb
  )
), upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO public.fleet_vehicles (
    registration_plate, company, vehicle_group, model, wash_type, eco, current_status,
    operational_priority, maintenance_flag, damage_flag, fuel_level, current_location,
    assigned_employee, notes, source_batch, raw_record
  )
  SELECT registration_plate, company, vehicle_group, model, wash_type, eco, current_status,
    operational_priority, maintenance_flag, damage_flag, fuel_level, current_location,
    assigned_employee, notes, source_batch, raw_record
  FROM src
  ON CONFLICT (lower(registration_plate)) DO UPDATE SET
    company = EXCLUDED.company,
    vehicle_group = EXCLUDED.vehicle_group,
    model = EXCLUDED.model,
    wash_type = EXCLUDED.wash_type,
    eco = EXCLUDED.eco,
    current_status = EXCLUDED.current_status,
    operational_priority = EXCLUDED.operational_priority,
    maintenance_flag = EXCLUDED.maintenance_flag,
    damage_flag = EXCLUDED.damage_flag,
    fuel_level = EXCLUDED.fuel_level,
    current_location = EXCLUDED.current_location,
    assigned_employee = EXCLUDED.assigned_employee,
    notes = EXCLUDED.notes,
    source_batch = EXCLUDED.source_batch,
    raw_record = EXCLUDED.raw_record,
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING (xmax = 0) AS inserted
)
SELECT count(*)::integer AS upserted_rows,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE inserted)::integer AS inserted_rows,
       count(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT inserted)::integer AS updated_rows
FROM upserted;

options.queryReplacement: ={{[$('Split Fleet Valid and Rejected').first().json.sourceBatch,$('Split Fleet Valid and Rejected').first().json.recordsSeen,$('Split Fleet Valid and Rejected').first().json.recordsValid,$('Split Fleet Valid and Rejected').first().json.recordsRejected,$('Split Fleet Valid and Rejected').first().json.duplicateCandidates,$('Split Fleet Valid and Rejected').first().json.highPriorityCount,JSON.stringify($('Split Fleet Valid and Rejected').first().json)]}}
